title: Property Consultant - Colliers India - Multiple Openings

jsonLd.title: Property Consultant - Colliers India - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Property Consultant looking for your next big career move? Colliers India in Noida offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Colliers India:
Colliers India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Flexible working hours
• Learning & development budget
• Life and accident insurance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Colliers India!
